commit_scope: Fix remaining BML native front-door SQL parameter casts that bind Form/Rust integers into PostgreSQL promoted read routes.

commands: if rg -n '\$[0-9]+::int|\$2 OR NOT' deploy/front-door/api.bml; then exit 1; fi
local_validation.notes: The patched BML front-door source compiles and serves /api/health through the Rust native kernel. No promoted-route SQL placeholder casts to int4 remain in deploy/front-door/api.bml.

ci_validation.notes: PR checks will run after push.

deploy_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy for PR #2957 advanced past graph-node-edges, then failed because /api/runtime/endpoints/summary?limit=2 returned 503 with error serializing parameter 0. This slice changes remaining BML promoted-route SQL int4 casts to bigint and converts inventory's include_internal SQL flag to 0/1 bigint.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Promoted BML read routes with integer window/day parameters should return native 200 responses instead of 503 persistence serialization failures.
test_flows: Hostinger Auto Deploy: BML front-door promoted read routes

phase_gate.notes: Pending local proof, PR CI, and post-merge deploy verification.
